failure_modes.detail: The Phase 4 signoff memo itself says final validation should use at least one real candidate-to-alert run rather than seeded or purely local test data.
failure_modes.title: Alert-loop claims without real traffic would be overstated

failure_modes.detail: Phase 6 reporting explicitly says threshold recommendations should stay shadow-only until they survive larger replay windows.
failure_modes.title: ML thresholds are shadow-only recommendations

failure_modes.detail: Task 2 froze the path definition but marked the overall reference chain as missing runtime outputs.
failure_modes.title: Replay-to-alert reproducibility is not yet materially demonstrated in this workspace

observability_caveats.detail: Phase 7 observability logic is implemented, but no local alert/evidence history exists to populate those metrics in this workspace snapshot.
observability_caveats.title: Goodhart and observability analysis exists as code and policy, not as current measured evidence

observability_caveats.detail: The committed Phase 7 observability study code explicitly warns that better visible precision is not the same as preserved tradable or investigative edge.
observability_caveats.title: Visible operator metrics may not preserve true lead time or hidden candidate edge

provider_issues.detail: Current default evidence providers are ['noop_news', 'noop_social'], which means the persistence path exists but richer real retrieval evidence is not the default runtime state.
provider_issues.title: Evidence providers default to placeholder noop adapters

provider_issues.detail: Telegram and Discord integrations exist, but the settings default to disabled unless credentials are configured.
provider_issues.title: Live delivery integrations are gated and may be disabled

weak_regimes.detail: Phase 2 through Phase 7 tables are present structurally but populated counts are zero in the committed local SQLite snapshot.
weak_regimes.title: No materialized later-phase runtime evidence in the current workspace

weak_regimes.detail: Alert precision, calibration, lead time, and paper-trade edge cannot be computed honestly from the current workspace because the required runtime artifacts are absent.
weak_regimes.title: Canonical v1 metrics are mostly unavailable rather than merely weak

weak_regimes.detail: The committed Phase 6 trainer fits a linear starter ranker, and the reporting layer explicitly says it is not yet the final boosted-tree model promised by the full Phase 6 scope.
weak_regimes.title: Current ML implementation is still a starter baseline

blockers: Phase 4 signoff itself says final evidence should come from a real live candidate-to-alert run

readiness_summary.highest_priority_gap: No real alert/evaluation/backtest evidence exists locally, so none of the SRS priority metrics can be defended numerically in this workspace.

stop_conditions.reason: No raw archive partitions or manifest rows are present locally, so current archive-gap risk cannot be assessed from this workspace snapshot.

stop_conditions.condition: duplicate trade inflation cannot be controlled
stop_conditions.reason: The repo contains the Phase 1 validation framework, but no current populated trade data or recent validation outputs are present locally to prove duplicate inflation is bounded.

stop_conditions.condition: alert false-positive rate remains operationally unusable after suppression tuning
stop_conditions.reason: There are no persisted alerts, delivery attempts, or analyst feedback rows in the workspace, so operational false-positive behavior cannot be measured yet.

stop_conditions.condition: evidence-provider spend exceeds budget without measurable lift
stop_conditions.reason: Default providers are noop adapters and no live spend evidence exists locally, so overspend is not currently happening here, but real-provider lift remains unevidenced.

stop_conditions.condition: replay cannot reproduce a historical alert end to end
stop_conditions.reason: Task 2's frozen reference path concluded with missing runtime outputs across replay, candidate, alert, validation, and ML/research stages, so a full historical-alert reproduction cannot currently be demonstrated from this workspace.
